title: Secure storage for Azure Files and Azure Blob Storage
summary: Secure storage for Azure Files and Azure Blob Storage.

sections.title: Secure storage for Azure Files and Azure Blob Storage
sections.summary: Secure storage for Azure Files and Azure Blob Storage.

lessons.title: Create an Azure Storage account
lessons.content_md:
Discover ways to use an Azure Storage account to manage your data for billing, access, and storage location of your blobs, files, queues, and tables.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/create-azure-storage-account/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Configure Azure Blob Storage
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to configure Azure Blob Storage, including tiers and object replication.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-blob-storage/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Configure Azure Files
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to configure Azure Files for cloud file shares.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-azure-files-file-sync/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Configure Azure Storage security
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to configure common Azure Storage security features like storage access signatures.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-storage-security/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Secure and isolate access to Azure resources by using network security groups and service endpoints
lessons.content_md:
Find out how Azure network security groups and service endpoints help you secure your virtual machines and Azure services from unauthorized network access.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/secure-and-isolate-with-nsg-and-service-endpoints/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Secure and isolate access to Azure resources by using network security groups and service endpoints

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Secure storage for Azure Files and Azure Blob Storage
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Secure storage for Azure Files and Azure Blob Storage**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
